title: Uniface Messages 1000-1999
text: Uniface Messages 1000-1999 Refer to the Uniface message number, message text, and an explanation of the message. The following table refers to messages with numbering between 1000 - 1999 . Search: Column Message number Message text Explanation Filter results... 508 rows found Message number Message text Explanation Filter 508 rows found Filter 508 rows found Filter 508 rows found Message number Message text Explanation 1001 Entity EntityName overlaps border of header frame. Adjust the dimensions of the entity, or shift its position on the Paint Tableau. 1002 Entity EntityName overlaps border of trailer frame. Adjust the dimensions of the entity, or shift its position on the Paint Tableau. 1003 No installation assignment available for DBMS DBName . The application referenced a DBMS that is not available on your system. Remove the reference to that DBMS, or reinstall Uniface to make the DBMS available. 1004 Cannot read application AppName to scan for perform labels. An application compile error appears in the message frame. The compiler cannot reread the application definition table. See previous messages to locate the problem. Also, check the file protections. 1005 Cannot read compiled component ComponentName to scan for perform labels. An application compile error appears in the message frame. Uniface could not find or open the compiled component specified in the Define Scan List form ( Define Start-up Properties form). Check that the component name is correctly listed on this form; if it is correct, check whether the component was compiled. The definitions may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the immediately preceding I/O message. 1006 Link failed; status: Status . An application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. The linker detected an error. Check the manual for your linker for appropriate action based on the return status. 1007 Dispatch table compilation failed; status: Status . An application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. The compiler or assembler cannot be started. Based on the return status, check the operating system manual for appropriate action. The definitions may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the immediately preceding message. 1008 Application shell compilation stopped due to compilation errors. An application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. The compile found compile and link errors, stopped compiling and did not deliver a compiled definition because of the errors. See previous messages to locate the problem. Correct the errors and recompile. 1009 Application shell compilation stopped; no definition found. Application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. You tried to compile an application shell definition that does not exist or is not accessible. Check if the start-up shell exists; if it does, check your system parameters. 1010 Component compilation stopped; no definition found. A component compilation error appears in the message frame. You tried to compile a component definition that does not exist or is not accessible. Check for a valid component definition; if it exists, check your system parameters. 1011 Entity frame FrameName defined more than once. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. You painted an entity more than once in the component Paint Tableau. Check the entity name specified. Rename or delete one of the entities. Use a subtype entity if necessary. 1012 Entity frame in application screen paint not allowed; entity ignored. An application shell compilation warning appears in the message frame. You defined an entity frame on the start-up shell Paint Tableau; this is meaningless and is therefore ignored. Remove the entity frame. 1013 Entity EntityName overlaps first occurrence of entity EntityName (1). A component compilation error appears in the message frame. You painted two overlapping entity frames. Check the dimensions of both entity frames, or the number of carriage returns between entity frame definitions, or both. 1014 Field FORM painted more than once. An application shell compilation error appears in the message frame. You defined more than one FORM field on the start-up shell Paint Tableau. Rename or delete one of the fields. 1015 Field FORM not found on application shell Paint Tableau. An application compilation error appears in the message frame. You did not define a FORM field in the application shell Paint Tableau. Check your application shell painter for the FORM field frame. 1016 (Fields for) entity EntityName not found in application model….generating now. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. The entity specified is painted on the Paint Tableau, but does not exist in the application model. If the entity accesses data in the database, it must be included in the model. Check why it is not defined in the model. If the fields or the entity are dummy fields or entities, no action is required. 1017 Compiling a component without entities is not allowed. The component does not contain an entity frame or printer frame, which is needed to allow the form to be compiled. For example, this can occur when you: Compile a component before adding entities or fields. Compile a Help Form (a Form with Data Access set to H (Non-editable form) ) that has been migrated from an early version of Uniface and not recompiled since. 1018 Field FieldName in entity EntityName (1) outside first occurrence. A component compilation error appears in the message frame. The field frame specified does not fit within the occurrence size defined for the entity frame to which the field belongs. Check the field and entity frame dimensions. 1019 Fields for included EntityName not found. A component compilation warning. Fields for the specified included entity are present in the component structure, but do not exist in the modeled entity. If the entity accesses data in the database, it must be included in the modeled entity. Check why it is not defined in the model. If the fields or the entity are non-database fields or entities, no action is required. Message source: Fields for included %%$sub not found. 1020 Layout template ModeledLayout for component variable VariableName not found The specified component variable references a Modeled Layout Property, but Uniface cannot find it. Check that the layout exists and that the library is correctly specified. You used /gly to compile a glyph from the command line. For some reason, an illegal definition was found in the UGLYPH entity and your glyph was not compiled to UOBJ. 1003 No installation assignment available for DBMS DBName . The application referenced a DBMS that is not available on your system. Remove the reference to that DBMS, or reinstall Uniface to make the DBMS available. 1004 Cannot read application AppName to scan for perform labels. An application compile error appears in the message frame. The compiler cannot reread the application definition table. See previous messages to locate the problem. Also, check the file protections. 1005 Cannot read compiled component ComponentName to scan for perform labels. An application compile error appears in the message frame. Uniface could not find or open the compiled component specified in the Define Scan List form ( Define Start-up Properties form). Check that the component name is correctly listed on this form; if it is correct, check whether the component was compiled. The definitions may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the immediately preceding I/O message. 1006 Link failed; status: Status . An application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. The linker detected an error. Check the manual for your linker for appropriate action based on the return status. 1007 Dispatch table compilation failed; status: Status . An application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. The compiler or assembler cannot be started. Based on the return status, check the operating system manual for appropriate action. The definitions may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the immediately preceding message. 1008 Application shell compilation stopped due to compilation errors. An application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. The compile found compile and link errors, stopped compiling and did not deliver a compiled definition because of the errors. See previous messages to locate the problem. Correct the errors and recompile. 1009 Application shell compilation stopped; no definition found. Application shell compile and link error appears in the message frame. You tried to compile an application shell definition that does not exist or is not accessible. Check if the start-up shell exists; if it does, check your system parameters. 1010 Component compilation stopped; no definition found. A component compilation error appears in the message frame. You tried to compile a component definition that does not exist or is not accessible. Check for a valid component definition; if it exists, check your system parameters. 1011 Entity frame FrameName defined more than once. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. You painted an entity more than once in the component Paint Tableau. Check the entity name specified. Rename or delete one of the entities. Use a subtype entity if necessary. 1012 Entity frame in application screen paint not allowed; entity ignored. An application shell compilation warning appears in the message frame. You defined an entity frame on the start-up shell Paint Tableau; this is meaningless and is therefore ignored. Remove the entity frame. 1013 Entity EntityName overlaps first occurrence of entity EntityName (1). A component compilation error appears in the message frame. You painted two overlapping entity frames. Check the dimensions of both entity frames, or the number of carriage returns between entity frame definitions, or both. 1014 Field FORM painted more than once. An application shell compilation error appears in the message frame. You defined more than one FORM field on the start-up shell Paint Tableau. Rename or delete one of the fields. 1015 Field FORM not found on application shell Paint Tableau. An application compilation error appears in the message frame. You did not define a FORM field in the application shell Paint Tableau. Check your application shell painter for the FORM field frame. 1016 (Fields for) entity EntityName not found in application model….generating now. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. The entity specified is painted on the Paint Tableau, but does not exist in the application model. If the entity accesses data in the database, it must be included in the model. Check why it is not defined in the model. If the fields or the entity are dummy fields or entities, no action is required. 1017 Compiling a component without entities is not allowed. The component does not contain an entity frame or printer frame, which is needed to allow the form to be compiled. For example, this can occur when you: Compile a component before adding entities or fields. Compile a Help Form (a Form with Data Access set to H (Non-editable form) ) that has been migrated from an early version of Uniface and not recompiled since. 1018 Field FieldName in entity EntityName (1) outside first occurrence. A component compilation error appears in the message frame. The field frame specified does not fit within the occurrence size defined for the entity frame to which the field belongs. Check the field and entity frame dimensions. 1019 Fields for included EntityName not found. A component compilation warning. Fields for the specified included entity are present in the component structure, but do not exist in the modeled entity. If the entity accesses data in the database, it must be included in the modeled entity. Check why it is not defined in the model. If the fields or the entity are non-database fields or entities, no action is required. Message source: Fields for included %%$sub not found. 1020 Layout template ModeledLayout for component variable VariableName not found The specified component variable references a Modeled Layout Property, but Uniface cannot find it. Check that the layout exists and that the library is correctly specified. You used /gly to compile a glyph from the command line. For some reason, an illegal definition was found in the UGLYPH entity and your glyph was not compiled to UOBJ. 1021 Field interface template ModeledProperty not found; defaults assumed. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. A field property refers to a field interface template that does not exist or cannot be accessed. Uniface assumes defaults for the model entries in this case. Check why the model is not available. 1022 Data type generated as Numeric for field FieldName. The data type for the indicated field is not specified. Because the data packing code on the Define Field Interface Template form is defined as numeric, Uniface assumes a numeric data type. Check the Define Component Field form and enter the correct data type. 1023 Compilation done Self explanatory. 1024 Field syntax for field is overwritten on component level because fsyntaxoverride pragma is set When a supertype entity specifies a field syntax of MAN (mandatory), it is not possible to change this value in its subtype entities, or in components that use the subtype entities. It is possible to override this behavior by setting #pragma fsyntaxoverride . When the #pragma fsyntaxoverride is present, and the field syntax of the subtype entity differs from the supertype, the component is compiled but this warning is issued. Type: Warning 1025 Field syntax template ModeledProperty not found; defaults assumed. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. You entered a field property that refers to a syntax template that does not exist or cannot be accessed. Uniface assumes defaults for the model entries in this case. Check why the model is not available. 1026 Cannot claim sufficient memory; component too large. Insufficient memory is available to compile the component. Check the width of the component; the maximum width specified for a line determines the width of the entire component. A line that is excessively long can have an adverse effect on a large component. Other reasons for the problem can be related to your system configuration. Is the disk full? Is the hardware functioning correctly? Consult your system administrator. The Uniface work area may not be adequate. 1027 Field layout template Modeled Property for Object not found, defaults assumed. The field, component variable, or global variable refers to a nonexistent field layout template, or the template cannot be accessed. Uniface assumes defaults for the template entries in this case. Check why the template is not available. 1028 Horizontal size entity EntityName adjusted to be multiple of occurrence size. Check the field frame definition. 1029 Too many relationships with the same foreign key. The same foreign key is referenced by more than 64 relationship definitions (the maximum). This can occur if the entities in your relationship contain a large number of subtypes. To compile your component, you must reduce the number of relationships that use this foreign key (this is defined in the model). 1030 Named A frame FrameName has no relation to E frame. The named area frame must have the same name as the enclosed entity frame, including the name of the model. For example, if the entity is named ENTITY.MODEL, the area frame should also be named ENTITY.MODEL. This error can also occur if your entity frame does not fit completely inside the dimensions of the named area frame, or when the area frame does not enclose an entity. 1031 Cannot find entity descriptor for parameter ParameterName of Function . The entity is declared as a function parameter in the service signature, or is declared as the parameter in a ProcScript function’s parameter block. In either case, the compiler cannot find an entity descriptor for the entity. Analyze the model that contains the entity definition and try again. 1032 Entry format for field FieldName ignored because maximum length > 63. A component compilation warning appears in the message frame. An entry format specification in the syntax template is not allowed for fields with a logical length greater than 63 characters. Either select another entry format, or choose a field length less than 64 characters. 1033 Cannot read application definition for update. An application shell compilation error appears in the message frame. The application shell has compiled; Uniface attempts to update the application definition source table with the date and time of the last update, but this source table is not accessible. Check why the read operation failed; this is probably caused by hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the preceding I/O message. 1034 Specified code list not found. A component prototyping error message. The .frm file for the code list you want to update is not available. Check the component name you specified. The code list may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the preceding I/O message. 1035 Requested component not found for prototyping/testing. The .frm file for the component you want to prototype is not found. Check the component name you specified. The component may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the preceding I/O message. 1036 Specified component is not a code list. A code list maintenance error message. You tried to update a component that is not a code list. Check the name of the component. 1037 Prototyping a HELP form does not serve any purpose. A component prototyping error message. A help component cannot contain data, so prototyping does not serve any purpose. Check the component name and type. 1038 Component does not contain entities or fields; prototyping impossible. A component prototyping error message. You tried to prototype a component that is not a help component and does not contain field or entity frames. This does not serve any purpose. Check the component name and type. 1039 Requested keyboard translation table not found. A keyboard translation table error appears in the message frame. Uniface cannot find the keyboard translation source table. Ensure that the correct name is specified. The table may be present but not accessible due to hardware problems or incorrect system parameters. Check the preceding I/O message. 1040 Data type generated as Float for field FieldName. A component compilation message appears in the message frame. The data type for this field is not specified. The packing code is Float, so Uniface assumes a Float data type for this field. Check this assumption; specify the data type as Float in the Define Component Field form. 1041 Cannot compile: component structure reference table contains too many elements. The compilation process failed because the number of elements in the reference table for the component editor exceeds 32,767 bytes. This is the maximum set by the compiler. 1042 Cannot read component definition for update. A component compilation error message appears in the message frame. The component has compiled and Uniface attempts to update the component definition source record with the date and time of the last update. However the source is not accessible. Check why the read operation failed; hardware problems or incorrect system parameters may be the reason for this. Check the preceding I/O message. 1043 Field FieldName assumed maximum length of Length . Uniface generates a field length according to specifications in a syntax definition; in this case the length generated differs from the default length. Check if the length is correct. If the field is a database field, check that the length corresponds to the database specification. If not, specify the correct length on the Define Field Interface Template form. 1044 Cannot compile: Component designer exceeds maximum size set by compiler. The compilation process failed because the component editor exceeds 32,767 bytes. This is the maximum set by the compiler. 1045 Packing code and fixed length inconsistent for field FieldName. The packing code defined for the field conflicts with the specified field length. Specify the correct length or packing code on the Define Field Interface Template form. 1046 Cannot compile: prototype structure tables contain too many elements. The compilation process failed because the prototype structure tables exceed 32,767 bytes. This is the maximum set by the compiler. 1047 Cannot compile: key table exceeds maximum size set by compiler. The compilation process failed because the key table exceeds 32,767 bytes. This is the maximum set by the compiler. 1048 Requested identification type for field <Field> not supported. You entered a Field Identifier type on the More Properties form ( Define Field Interface form) which is not supported. Activate the drop-down list for the Identification Type field to retrieve a code list of all supported identifier types. Select the appropriate type. 1049 Requested identification type for entity EntityName not supported. In the Modeled Entity Interface, you specified an Entity Identifier type that is not supported. Choose a valid Identification Type from the drop-down list. 1050 Requested data packing code for field FieldName not supported. You entered a nonsupported data packing code on the Define Field Interface form. Activate the drop-down list for the Data Packing field to retrieve a code list of the available packing codes. Select the appropriate packing code. 1051 Identification type for field FieldName inconsistent with id string. The field identifier (string) and type that you specified on the More Properties form are inconsistent. Ensure that both entries are supplied and that they agree. 1052 Identification type for entity EntityName inconsistent with id string. The entity identifier (string) and type you specified on the More Properties form are not consistent. Ensure that both entries are supplied and that they agree. 1053 Header frame must be painted above all other frames. A header frame was painted on a nonvalid location on the component editor. Paint the header frame as the first frame. 1054 Entity frames not allowed below a break frame or trailer frame. You cannot paint an entity frame below a page break or trailer frame. A trailer frame must be painted as the last frame. 1055 Only one header frame may be defined per component. More than one header frame is painted on the component. Remove one of the header frames. 1056 HEADER may not be used as an entity name. You painted an entity with the name HEADER. This is a Uniface reserved word. Rename the entity, or make it frame type H, if it should be a header frame. 1057 Only one trailer frame allowed per component. More than one trailer frame is defined on the component. Remove one of the trailer frames. 1058 TRAILER may not be used as an entity name. You painted an entity with the name TRAILER. This is a Uniface reserved word. Rename the entity, or make it frame type T, if it should be a trailer frame. 1059 Cannot compile: number of component variables defined exceeds maximum set by compiler. The compilation process failed because the number of defined component variables exceeds 32,767 bytes. This is the maximum set by the compiler. 1060 Cannot compile: number of paint labels exceeds maximum set by compiler. The compilation process failed because the number of print labels exceeds 32,767 bytes. This is the maximum set by the compiler. 1061 Error in variable length part of interface for parameter ParameterName of Function . In the service signature, an error occurred in the variable-length part of the interface definition of a function’s parameter. Correct the error and recompile the service signature. 1062 Incorrect sequence number for parameter ParameterName of Function . The service signature contains an error in the sequence numbering of the function’s parameters. A gap occurred in the range or a number is repeated. Correct the error and recompile the service signature. 1063 The literal string length ( length ) exceeds 2048 bytes. The length of the literal string is longer than 2048 bytes, which prevents the component from being compiled. Uniface stores the literal strings in a label pool. A single string cannot be longer than 2048 bytes. The literal label pool contains any literals used within the component, such as component names, field names, entity and model names, component variables, menus, and component titles. To enable the component to be compiled, you must rename objects in the component to fit this limit. 1064 Literal Label Pool exceeds 4GB The size of the Literal Label Pool exceeds 4 gigabytes of contiguous memory, which prevents the component from being compiled. The literal label pool contains any literals used within the component, such as component names, field names, entity and model names, component variables, menus, and component titles. To enable the component to be compiled, you must remove objects in the component or give objects a shorter name. 1065 Field FieldName of entity EntityName (1) might be truncated on output to DBMS. The syntax length of the field specified exceeds the fixed length. You may have entered more data than can be saved. Check that the definitions are correct. A display format, or some other conversion type may be involved. 1066 Field FieldName interface model inconsistent with data type. The field interface definitions conflict with the data type (for example, a date packing code with an S field). Correct one of the entries. 1067 Entry format field FieldName skipped; no entry formats on N, F fields. The entry format is not supported with numeric or floating point fields. 1069 No entity or model specified for field FieldName . You painted a field outside the entity. Check your borderlines. If a borderline was painted through a field, Uniface cannot detect if the field belongs in that entity. 1070 No keys found for entity EntityName. The compiler cannot find a primary key definition for the entity. Specify the primary key for the entity. If it is defined, check why the compiler cannot access this information. 1071 Key field FieldName not found in field properties for entity EntityName (1). The field is defined as part of a foreign or primary key, but was not found in the field properties for the entity. Check if the primary key or relationships are correctly defined, or why the definition for the field is missing. 1072 Scaling (# of fractional digits) of field FieldName changed to Value . The compiler concluded that the numeric scaling defined for a field was incorrectly based on other definitions. Check if the assumed scaling is correct. 1073 Fields of foreign key in entity EntityName are not in sequence. The fields in the key are not in the same sequence as the fields in the primary key of the one entity. This presents a problem for some DBMSs. Check if your DBMS can support this type of structure. If not, correct the definition. 1074 Entity EntityName missing for integrity control on del/upd of EntityName . This is a warning message from the compiler. A foreign key relationship is defined between the specified entity and one of the entities on the component layout. Because the specified entity is not included on the component layout, the referential integrity constraints cannot be checked. If you want Uniface to enforce the referential integrity constraints, include the entity definition marker for the second entity and recompile. 1075 Relationship one Entity1 to many Entity2 is questionable. The relationship defined in the application model is semantically questionable. The subtype is probably the one and the supertype is the many. In many cases, this type of relationship is valid. Ensure that the relationship definition is correct. 1076 No path found to the painted entity EntityName . An entity was painted inside another entity, but a relationship is not defined between them. If the relationship is ad hoc, no action is required. Otherwise specify the relationship in the application model. If it is already specified, check why the compiler cannot access that information. 1077 Key field FieldName of entity EntityName (1) is not contiguous. In a primary key, you must define the fields in succession; other fields should not be defined between them. This message is generated when the specified key field is not adjacent to the previous key field, as defined. This presents a problem for some DBMSs. Check that your DBMS supports this type of structure. If not, you must correct the definition. 1078 Key field FieldName of entity EntityName (1) is not fixed length. The compiler has found that a field specified as part of a key has a variable length. This is not allowed. Correct the field properties or the key definition. 1079 Foreign key field FieldName of entity EntityName (1) not found in interface. A field referred to in the foreign or primary key definition for an entity was not found among the fields that will be stored for the entity. Ensure that the field is assigned to the entity, and that it is defined as in database Y. If the field should not be a key, correct the relationship or key definition. 1083 Dictionary does not contain fields; Load Fields failed. You tried to load fields onto the component Paint Tableau, but no fields were assigned to the specified entity. Check the application model definition for the entity. 1084 Insufficient space; Load Fields failed. The Load Fields facility did not find enough space on the Paint Tableau to load fields from the application model. Enlarge the size of your entity frame on the Paint Tableau and try again. If Load Fields fails again, even after correcting the dimensions of the frames on the component, orphan inconsistencies exist in the buffer. To remove these inconsistencies, exit the Paint Tableau and run it again (remember to ^ACCEPT, rather than ^QUIT). 1085 Valid options for this field are ‘N’, blank (no entry) or digits. The Sequence field on the Load Fields form is used to define the order in which the fields will appear. The only valid options for this field are numbers, zeros and ‘N’. You have entered incorrect values. Check your definition and try again. 1087 Entity EntityName : model/component definition conflict. A conflict exists between the definition of the entity in the application model and the component variation. The model definition is used by default. Check if the model definition is correct and remove the local definition for this entity. 1088 Entity EntityName field FieldName (1): model/component definition conflict. A conflict exists between the definition of the field in the application model and the component variation. The model definition is used by default. Check if the model definition is correct, and remove the local definition for this entity. 1089 Application Shell compilation stopped; apStart trigger empty. This trigger contains no ProcScript statements. It should contain at least an activate statement to start the first component. 1090 Foreign key relationship Entity1 —> Entity2 does not have enough fields. The number of fields defined for the primary or the candidate key does not match the number of foreign key fields in the relationship definition. Correct the relationship or key definition. 1091 Foreign key relationship Entity1 —> Entity2 has too many fields. The number of fields defined for the primary or the candidate key does not match the number of foreign key fields in the relationship definition. Correct the relationship or key definition. 1092 N tables loaded. Displays the number of definitions for DBMS tables that were loaded into the application model. 1093 No foreign key; ad hoc Cardinality relation assumed for entity EntityName . A relationship is defined between two entities painted inside each other in a component, but no fields are defined with the relationship. This message indicates the direction of the ad hoc relationship (one-to-many or many-to-one). If the relationship is meant to be ad hoc, no action is required. Ensure that the coding required for an ad hoc relationship is present. 1094 Entity EntityName (1) defined within HEADER. An entity was painted inside a header frame. This is not supported. Remove the entity marker or correct the dimensions of the header frame. 1095 Entity EntityName (1) defined within TRAILER. An entity was painted inside a trailer frame. This is not supported. Remove the entity marker or correct the dimensions of the trailer frame. 1096 Syntax definition for key field FieldName of entity EntityName (1) overrides (mandatory) default. By default, all primary key fields are mandatory. A syntax definition for the primary key field specified overrides this default. Check if the default should be overridden. 1097 Chosen display format probably insufficient for field FieldName . The display format for the field specified cannot display all the characters that the field contains. Correct the display format definition if this is a problem. 1098 Field FieldName overlaps field FieldName (1). The frames of two painted fields overlap each other. Adjust the position of the fields on the Paint Tableau. 1099 Application logon error….application was not started. You tried to start an application and a logon to the database. The logon operation failed. Check why the logon failed. 1100 Logging on to database now…. Uniface is opening the database. 1101 Operation OperationName is in a one-way asynchronous component; parameter ParameterName should be IN. The service signature defines one of the parameters of a function in an asynchronous service as OUT or INOUT . Define the parameter as IN or define the function as synchronous. 1102 An index cannot exceed 500 bytes. This message is generated following an Analyze Model operation or a component compilation. The component or model specified contains an entity that is defined with an index greater than 500 bytes. 1103 Entity EntityName , field FieldName (1); variable length interface possibly incorrect. You defined more than one variable-length field ‘C*’ in an entity. Use variable-length techniques to do this. 1104 One of the entities for relationship Entity1 -> Entity2 is missing. One of the entities specified in a relationship definition in the application model has not been defined. Define the entity now. 1105 Entity EntityName , field FieldName (1); fixed length interface possibly incorrect. A fixed-length field was defined after a variable-length field. The length of the fixed-length field cannot be checked. All fixed-length fields in an entity should be painted together, before the variable-length fields are defined. 1106 Entity parameter ParameterName of Entity is not found. The entity parameter is not known. Ensure that you define an existing entity (and model). 1107 Cannot compile; cannot access component definition. The compiler cannot find the requested component definition. Check the name of the component. If it is correct, check the system and hardware configuration. 1108 Cannot delete listing; component definition not found. The ProcScript compilation listing cannot be deleted because the component definition was not found. Check the name of the component. If it is correct, check the system and hardware configuration. 1109 Cannot delete listing; component definition not found. The ProcScript compilation listing cannot be deleted because the component definition was not found. Check the name of the component. If it is correct, check the system and hardware configuration. 1110 Generating and compiling signature for Component …. This message is self-explanatory. 1111 Generated signature for Component could not be compiled. The signature generated by the component compiler cannot be compiled. 1112 Total Proc compile errors Total . The ProcScript compiler found errors. See previous messages to locate the problem. Correct these and compile again. 1113 ****** NO NEW APPLICATION CREATED ******* A serious error prevented compilation of the application. See previous messages to locate the problem. Correct the error and compile again. 1114 ****** NO NEW FORM CREATED ******* A serious error prevented compilation of the component. See previous messages to locate the problem. Correct the error and compile again. 1115 Cannot compile; application definition not found. The compiler cannot find the requested application definition. Check the name of the application. If it is correct, check the system and hardware configuration. 1116 Cannot delete listing; application definition not found. The ProcScript compilation listing for the application cannot be deleted, because the application definition cannot be found. Check the name of the application. If it is correct, check the system and hardware configuration. 1118 Entity EntityName (used as parameter) must be in database. The compiler detected a dummy entity being used as a parameter. An entity parameter should be a database or non-database model entity. 1119 Descriptor for entity EntityName too large. The analyzed entity used as a parameter is larger than 16 kilobytes. 1120 Ready for code list update. The requested component code list is displayed after compilation, and is ready to receive new codes for storage in the repository. Edit the data and store with ^ACCEPT. 1123 Prototype information is deleted. The prototype data (including codes for a code list) was successfully deleted. This message is informative only. 1124 Code list updated. You used ^ACCEPT after editing a code list. The codes are stored in the repository. This message is informative only. 1125 Prototype information saved as requested. You chose File > Save after prototyping a component. The sample data is stored in the repository. 1126 Cannot compile; specified information not found. The compiler cannot find the information it needs. Check why the information cannot be accessed. 1127 Cannot compile keyboard input table Entity1 . This is a generic compiler message. More specific error messages are available in the message frame. 1128 Cannot compile device translation table TableName . This is a generic compiler message. More specific error messages are available in the message frame. 1129 Only ‘A’ (all) allowed.
